backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Resume data types and CRUD operations (save, get, delete) keyed by session token using a Map, with blob storage mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: fixing text color visibility/contrast across themes, and adding a 'Download as Image' PNG button to the resume builder UI.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, key implementation details, and notable design decisions.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the sticky header with Save, Download as Image, and Save as HTML buttons, a split form/preview layout with mobile toggle, and a WelcomeScreen gate backed by localStorage.
frontend/src/components/CertificationsSe: Repeatable form section for certification entries (name, issuer, issue date, expiry date) with add and remove controls.
frontend/src/components/EducationSection: Repeatable form section for education entries (degree, major, institution, graduation year) with add and remove controls.
frontend/src/components/ExperienceSectio: Renders a dynamic list of work experience entries with fields for job title, company, dates, and description, supporting add/remove operations.
frontend/src/components/PersonalInfoSect: Form section for entering personal information including name, job title, contact details, professional summary, LinkedIn, and GitHub URLs.
frontend/src/components/ProfilePhotoSect: Handles profile photo upload via file input, displays a preview with remove option, and manages blob URL lifecycle to prevent memory leaks.
Renders a dynamic list of project entries with fields for name, tech stack, link, and description, supporting add/remove operations.
frontend/src/components/ResumeForm.tsx: Main resume form component that composes all section components (personal info, education, experience, skills, projects, certifications) inside an accordion layout with a profile photo section at the top.
frontend/src/components/ResumePreview.ts: Renders a styled, print-ready resume preview using inline styles, displaying all form data sections including a header with photo, contact info, and sections for education, experience, skills, projects, and certifications.
frontend/src/components/SkillsSection.ts: Renders a dynamic list of skill entries with a name input and proficiency level selector (Beginner to Expert), supporting add/remove operations.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeScreen.ts: Renders a full-screen welcome/landing page with a logo, feature highlights, and a 'Get Started' CTA button that triggers the onStart callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadImage.ts: Custom hook that captures a referenced DOM element, renders it via SVG foreignObject to a canvas, and triggers a PNG download at 2x resolution.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadPDF.ts: Custom hook that builds a styled HTML resume document from ResumeFormData (including base64-encoded profile photo) and triggers it as a downloadable HTML file intended for PDF printing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exposes useGetResume and useSaveResume hooks that fetch and persist resume data to the ICP backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useResumeData.ts: Manages resume form state with bidirectional mapping between local ResumeFormData and backend Resume types, syncing to both localStorage and the ICP backend with debounced auto-save.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Playfair Display fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme color tokens (backgrounds, foregrounds, primary, muted, etc.) plus print styles to isolate the resume preview.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/resume.ts: TypeScript type definitions and default factory functions for resume form data, including PersonalInfo, Education, Experience, Skill, Project, and Certification shapes.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Utility that generates a random 24-byte hex session token, persists it in localStorage, and exposes functions to get or create it.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts, CSS-variable-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations; enables dark mode via class and registers the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and pending feature requests—specifically a text color visibility fix and a Download as Image (PNG) feature for the resume builder.
